deploy/charts/openmeter/templates.purpose: Helm templates deploying all OpenMeter binaries (api, balance-worker, billing-worker, sink-worker, notification-service) plus optional dependencies (Svix, ClickHouse) as Kubernetes workloads. Every workload shares one ConfigMap-mounted config.yaml and the same image tag, enforcing homogeneous deployment across binaries.

patterns.name: componentName for all resource names
patterns.description: Resource names use include "openmeter.componentName" (list . "<component>"), never .Release.Name directly; the helper truncates to 63 chars for DNS compliance.

patterns.name: componentLabels / componentSelectorLabels
patterns.description: metadata.labels use openmeter.componentLabels and selector.matchLabels use openmeter.componentSelectorLabels; never write app.kubernetes.io labels inline.

patterns.name: checksum/config annotation on every pod template
patterns.description: Every Deployment and CronJob pod template carries checksum/config to force rollout on config changes.

patterns.name: initContainers gated on *.enabled via named templates
patterns.description: Init containers emit only when postgresql.enabled/clickhouse.enabled is true, using openmeter.init.postgres/clickhouse helpers — never inline readiness checks.

patterns.name: Shared image tag across all OpenMeter Deployments
patterns.description: All binary containers use Values.image.repository:Values.image.tag (default Chart.AppVersion); never pin a different image per component. Svix is the only exception.

patterns.name: Config via ConfigMap volume at /etc/openmeter
patterns.description: Every workload mounts the openmeter.fullname ConfigMap at /etc/openmeter and passes --config /etc/openmeter/config.yaml; CA certs mount conditionally when caRootCertificates is set.
patterns.example:
volumes:
  - name: config
    configMap:
      name: {{ include "openmeter.fullname" . }}

patterns.name: Optional-dependency resources wrapped in enabled guards
patterns.description: Optional services (clickhouse.yaml, svix.yaml) wrap their entire content in {{- if .Values.<service>.enabled -}} and also add an override block in configmap.yaml's helmValuesConfig.

key_file_guides.role: All named templates: fullname, componentName, labels/selectorLabels, componentLabels/SelectorLabels, serviceAccountName, init-container helpers (netcat, postgres, clickhouse, redis).
key_file_guides.watch_for: componentName uses (list . "component") syntax — a plain string breaks it; name truncates at 62-len(component); init.redis uses a PING loop unlike netcat-based postgres/clickhouse.

key_file_guides.role: config.yaml ConfigMap deep-merging Values.config with auto-overrides via mergeOverwrite; emits ca-certificates ConfigMap when set.
key_file_guides.watch_for: helmValuesConfig uses fromYaml/mergeOverwrite — whitespace matters; a new self-hosted dependency needs an if .Values.<dep>.enabled override block mirroring config.example.yaml.

key_file_guides.role: Five Deployments (api, balance-worker, notification-service, sink-worker, billing-worker), each with its own replicaCount and entrypoint command.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Health probes hit /healthz/live and /healthz/ready on telemetry-http (10000), not the API port (80); all five need checksum/config.

key_file_guides.role: Three CronJobs (subscription-sync, billing-collect-invoices, billing-advance-invoices) with concurrencyPolicy Forbid, restartPolicy Never.
key_file_guides.watch_for: New CronJobs must set concurrencyPolicy Forbid; checksum/config must appear at both jobTemplate.metadata and template.metadata.

key_file_guides.role: Svix Deployment + Service gated on svix.enabled; config via env vars, not the shared ConfigMap.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Uses Values.svix.image and Values.svix.resources; init containers check postgres+redis, not clickhouse.

key_file_guides.role: ClickHouseInstallation CRD (Altinity operator) only when clickhouse.enabled.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Custom CRD (clickhouse.altinity.com/v1) — helm lint fails without the CRD; storage sizes are hardcoded, not values-driven.

key_file_guides.role: Ingress for the api Service only, with semverCompare-based API version selection.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Always targets the api component Service; emitted only when ingress.enabled; workers have no Ingress.

anti_patterns: Writing app.kubernetes.io/* labels inline instead of componentLabels/componentSelectorLabels.
Hardcoding names with .Release.Name instead of componentName/fullname.
Adding a Deployment/CronJob without checksum/config — config changes won't trigger rollouts.
Adding optional infra without both an enabled guard in the resource AND an override block in configmap.yaml.
Using different image fields per binary — all share Values.image; only Svix is exempt.

decisions.decision: Single shared ConfigMap merged at render time from Values.config plus per-flag overrides.
decisions.rationale: All binaries share one config.yaml schema; mergeOverwrite avoids per-binary ConfigMaps while auto-injecting self-hosted dependency addresses when *.enabled is set.

decisions.decision: CronJobs use concurrencyPolicy Forbid and restartPolicy Never.
decisions.rationale: Billing/sync jobs are not idempotent under concurrency; Forbid prevents overlap, and the next scheduled run handles recovery.

decisions.decision: Init containers generated from named templates, not inline YAML.
decisions.rationale: The same readiness-check logic is reused across all Deployments and CronJobs; centralizing ensures a consistent busybox tag and address derivation.

code_examples.scenario: Add a new worker Deployment (e.g. charges-worker)
